OneLineDescription: Flask-based alchemy — perk tree and ingredient tiers calibrated to your load order.
LongDescription: The load-order patcher for marth's Alchemy Overhaul (MAO). It rewrites the alchemy perk tree into MAO's field-kit perks (keeping non-crafting perks your list ships) and classifies every ingredient in your load order into rarity tiers for the essence economy. Requires the main MAO mod (SKSE plugin + MAO.esp). Run after installing MAO, and again after any load-order change.
